description:
When I step into this situation, I’m not just dealing with a reactive dog.
I’m dealing with a neighborhood conflict.
Stella has already attacked her neighbor, Tina, and her dog.
And yet, instead of taking legal action, Tina chooses something very rare.
She chooses to help.
She wants to be part of Stella’s rehabilitation and prevent something even worse from happening.
But when I evaluate Stella, I see something deeper than reactivity.
I see predatory behavior.
This isn’t just barking or lunging.
title: This Dog Attacked Again… During Rehabilitation | Cesar 911
